operations.old:
revisitNotice.textContent =
          "This pallet was already completed before. Last completed: " +
          (activity.lastCompletedAt || activity.lastScannedAt) +
          ". Completed runs: " +
          activity.completedRuns +
          ".";
operations.new:
revisitNotice.innerHTML =
          "This pallet was already completed before. Last completed: " +
          escapeHtml(activity.lastCompletedAt || activity.lastScannedAt) +
          ". Completed runs: " +
          escapeHtml(activity.completedRuns) +
          ". <button class=\"recheck-pallet-btn\" type=\"button\" data-pallet-id=\"" +
          escapeHtml(palletId) +
          "\">Check Again</button>";

operations.old:
revisitNotice.textContent =
          "This pallet has already been scanned before. Last activity: " +
          activity.lastScannedAt +
          ".";
operations.new:
revisitNotice.textContent =
          "This pallet has already been scanned before. Last activity: " +
          activity.lastScannedAt +
          ".";
